description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The upper level includes a spacious terrace adorned with numerous potted plants and geometric white sculptures, creating a lush rooftop garden. The facade combines white surfaces with vertical wooden slats and decorative green panels covered in white, leaf-like elements. Large rectangular windows provide ample natural light to the interior, while the terrace is enclosed by a transparent railing for safety and openness. The lower level includes a shaded area with visible seating and a wooden floor, suggesting a communal or living space. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a strong emphasis on integrating greenery and natural materials.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, rooftop garden, large windows, and a mix of white and wooden exterior elements. The design emphasizes greenery and geometric decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rooftop garden with potted plants, decorative white panels, and a shaded lower level with seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terrace, transparent railing, and vertical wooden slats on the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large rectangular windows and the full width of the terrace above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extensive green and white decorative panels and the rooftop garden's depth.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features steps, a shaded porch area, and a minimalist door integrated into the facade.
